creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I did commit but I forgot to do a 'maketest' in a poudriere clean environment.

Before that I have a question:

- since you are using "USE_PYTHON= .. pytest" do you need Makefile "do-test: .."?

- USE_PTTHON=pytest with or without "do-test" generate errors:

1- with 'do-test':

---
===================================================================================== test session starts =====================================================================================
platform freebsd13 -- Python 3.8.13, pytest-7.1.2, pluggy-1.0.0 -- /usr/local/bin/python3.8
cachedir: .pytest_cache
rootdir: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/py-freenit/work-py38/freenit-0.2.23, configfile: setup.cfg
plugins: factoryboy-2.1.0, anyio-3.6.1, asyncio-0.18.3
asyncio: mode=strict
collected 0 items / 2 errors

=========================================================================================== ERRORS ============================================================================================
_____________________________________________________________________________ ERROR collecting tests/test_auth.py _____________________________________________________________________________
ImportError while importing test module '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/py-freenit/work-py38/freenit-0.2.23/tests/test_auth.py'.
Hint: make sure your test modules/packages have valid Python names.
Traceback:
/usr/local/lib/python3.8/importlib/__init__.py:127: in import_module
    return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level)
tests/test_auth.py:3: in <module>
    from . import factories
tests/factories.py:2: in <module>
    from passlib.hash import pbkdf2_sha256
E   ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'passlib'
_____________________________________________________________________________ ERROR collecting tests/test_user.py _____________________________________________________________________________
ImportError while importing test module '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/py-freenit/work-py38/freenit-0.2.23/tests/test_user.py'.
Hint: make sure your test modules/packages have valid Python names.
Traceback:
/usr/local/lib/python3.8/importlib/__init__.py:127: in import_module
    return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level)
tests/test_user.py:5: in <module>
    from . import factories
tests/factories.py:2: in <module>
    from passlib.hash import pbkdf2_sha256
E   ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'passlib'
====================================================================================== warnings summary =======================================================================================
../../../../../../../usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/fastapi/__init__.py:7
  /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/fastapi/__init__.py:7: DeprecationWarning: ExceptionMiddleware is deprecated on `starlette.exceptions`. Import it from `starlette.middleware.exceptions` instead.
    from .applications import FastAPI as FastAPI

-- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html
!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Interrupted: 2 errors during collection !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
================================================================================ 1 warning, 2 errors in 0.13s =================================================================================
*** Error code 2
---

2- without 'do-test':

---
===================================================================================== test session starts =====================================================================================
platform freebsd13 -- Python 3.8.13, pytest-7.1.2, pluggy-1.0.0 -- /usr/local/bin/python3.8
cachedir: .pytest_cache
rootdir: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/py-freenit/work-py38/freenit-0.2.23, configfile: setup.cfg
plugins: asyncio-0.18.3, factoryboy-2.1.0, anyio-3.6.1
asyncio: mode=strict
collected 0 items / 1 error

=========================================================================================== ERRORS ============================================================================================
________________________________________________________________________________ ERROR collecting test session ________________________________________________________________________________
/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:607: in _importconftest
    mod = import_path(conftestpath, mode=importmode, root=rootpath)
/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/_pytest/pathlib.py:556: in import_path
    raise ImportPathMismatchError(module_name, module_file, path)
E   _pytest.pathlib.ImportPathMismatchError: ('tests.conftest', '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/py-freenit/work-py38/freenit-0.2.23/tests/conftest.py', PosixPath('/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/py-freenit/work-py38/freenit-0.2.23/freenit/project/tests/conftest.py'))
====================================================================================== warnings summary =======================================================================================
../../../../../../../usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/fastapi/__init__.py:7
  /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/fastapi/__init__.py:7: DeprecationWarning: ExceptionMiddleware is deprecated on `starlette.exceptions`. Import it from `starlette.middleware.exceptions` instead.
    from .applications import FastAPI as FastAPI

-- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html
!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Interrupted: 1 error during collection !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
================================================================================= 1 warning, 1 error in 0.12s =================================================================================
*** Error code 2

Please investigate this errors and if you think that if it is needed I can revert to 0.2.21 until problems are fixed.

I will keep this PR open.

Cheers,

Nuno Teixeira
